title: Nassella holwayi
intro: Nassella holwayi, also known as Holway's needlegrass, is a perennial grass native to the southwestern United States. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which may contribute to its potential health benefits, such as wound healing and relief from respiratory issues. Bioactive constituents of Nassella holwayi include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Nassella holwayi is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are utilized for their potential therapeutic benefits.
